# terrible_community_general_keycloak_clientscope_type (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `client_id` (String) The `client_id` of the client. If not set the clientscope types are set as a default for the realm.
- `default_clientscopes` (String) Client scopes that should be of type default.
- `optional_clientscopes` (String) Client scopes that should be of type optional.
- `realm` (String) The Keycloak realm.

### Read-Only

- `end_state` (String) Representation of client scopes after module execution. The sample is truncated.
- `existing` (String) Representation of client scopes before module execution.
- `msg` (String) Message as to what action was taken.
- `proposed` (String) Representation of proposed client-scope types mapping.
